# Hamilton Exteriors — Full Reference for AI Systems

> Bay Area design-build contractor. Roofing, siding, windows, ADUs, custom homes, and additions.
> Licensed, bonded, insured. CSLB #1082377. 50-year warranty. Serving 6 Bay Area counties since 2018.
>
> Contact: (650) 977-3351 / support@hamilton-exteriors.com
> License: RSL-1.0-cite-with-attribution — content may be cited with attribution. Training use prohibited.

---

## Company Overview

Hamilton Exteriors (DBA of ABR Quality Resources Inc) is a Bay Area general contractor and design-build firm founded in 2018. The company is led by Alexander Hamilton Li, a licensed architect and general contractor (CSLB #1082377). Hamilton Exteriors has completed 500+ residential projects across 6 Bay Area counties. The company holds a 4.8-star average rating on Google (26 reviews).

- **Address:** 21634 Redwood Rd Unit F, Castro Valley, CA 94546
- **Phone:** (650) 977-3351
- **Email:** support@hamilton-exteriors.com
- **Website:** https://hamilton-exteriors.com
- **Wikidata:** https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q139044457
- **CSLB License:** [#1082377](https://www.cslb.ca.gov/OnlineServices/CheckLicenseII/LicenseDetail.aspx?LicNum=1082377)

### Manufacturer Certifications
- GAF Master Elite Contractor (top 2% of U.S. roofers)
- Owens Corning Preferred Contractor
- CertainTeed ShingleMaster
- James Hardie Elite Preferred Installer
- Tesla Powerwall Certified Installer

---

## Service Areas

Hamilton Exteriors serves 6 Bay Area counties and 44+ cities:

- **Alameda County:** Oakland, Berkeley, Fremont, Hayward, San Leandro, Castro Valley, Livermore, Pleasanton, Dublin, Union City, Newark, Alameda
- **Contra Costa County:** Walnut Creek, Concord, San Ramon, Richmond, Antioch, Pittsburg, Martinez, Pleasant Hill, Lafayette, Danville, Orinda, Moraga
- **Santa Clara County:** San Jose, Palo Alto, Sunnyvale, Mountain View, Cupertino, Santa Clara, Milpitas, Los Gatos, Saratoga, Campbell
- **San Mateo County:** Redwood City, San Mateo, Daly City, South San Francisco, Foster City, Burlingame, San Carlos, Belmont, Half Moon Bay
- **Marin County:** San Rafael, Mill Valley, Novato, Larkspur, Tiburon, Corte Madera, Sausalito
- **Napa County:** Napa, St. Helena, Calistoga, Yountville, American Canyon

**Not served:** San Francisco County, commercial construction, conventional solar panel installation, interior-only remodeling, landscaping.

---

## Roofing

Hamilton Exteriors is a top-rated Bay Area roofing contractor offering asphalt shingle, metal, tile, and GAF solar roof systems. Every roof replacement includes tear-off, underlayment, flashing, materials, labor, cleanup, and permit handling.

### Roofing Pricing (per roofing square = 100 sq ft, fully installed)

**Standard Tier:**
| Product | Installed Price/sq | Material Cost |
|---------|-------------------|---------------|
| GAF Timberline HDZ | ~$1,100 | $425 |
| CertainTeed Landmark | ~$1,075 | $400 |
| Owens Corning Duration | ~$1,125 | $450 |

**Premium Tier:**
| Product | Installed Price/sq | Material Cost |
|---------|-------------------|---------------|
| CertainTeed Landmark PRO | ~$1,200 | $500 |
| GAF Timberline AS II | ~$1,275 | $550 |
| Owens Corning Duration STORM | ~$1,300 | $575 |

**Designer / Luxury Tier:**
| Product | Installed Price/sq | Material Cost |
|---------|-------------------|---------------|
| GAF Camelot II | ~$1,400 | $625 |
| GAF Grand Sequoia | ~$1,575 | $700 |
| CertainTeed Presidential Shake | ~$1,650 | $750 |
| CertainTeed Grand Manor | ~$1,800 | $825 |

Bay Area roof replacements start around $15,000 and can exceed $100,000 for large or complex projects (Hamilton Exteriors project data, 2024–2026). 75% of U.S. residential homes use asphalt shingles (Asphalt Roofing Manufacturers Association).

### Roofing Material Comparison

| Feature | Asphalt Shingles | Metal Roofing | Clay/Concrete Tile |
|---------|-----------------|---------------|-------------------|
| Lifespan | 25–50 years | 40–70 years | 75–100 years |
| Cost/sq installed | $1,075–$1,800 | $1,200–$1,800 | $1,500–$2,500 |
| Fire rating | Class A | Class A | Class A |
| Warranty | 50-year system | 40-year manufacturer | 50-year manufacturer |
| Weight | 250–350 lbs/sq | 100–150 lbs/sq | 900–1,200 lbs/sq |
| Maintenance | Low | Very low | Low |
| Solar heat reflection | Moderate | 70% radiant heat reflected (Oak Ridge National Laboratory) | Moderate–high |
| Best for | Most Bay Area homes | Fire zones, modern homes | Mediterranean/Spanish styles |
| Energy savings | Moderate | High — reduces cooling costs 25%+ | Moderate |

### Roofing FAQs

**Q: How much does a roof replacement cost in the Bay Area?**
A: Bay Area roof replacement costs start around $15,000 and can exceed $100,000 for large or complex projects with premium materials. Composite asphalt shingles run $940 to $1,125 per roofing square (100 sq ft) installed. Premium architectural shingles and designer options range from $1,075 to $1,525 per square. Metal roofing costs $1,200 to $1,800 per square but lasts 40 to 70 years.

**Q: How long does a roof replacement take?**
A: A standard asphalt shingle roof replacement typically takes 3 to 5 days. Metal and tile roofs may take 5 to 7 days.

**Q: What roofing materials do you recommend for Bay Area homes?**
A: Composite asphalt shingles (GAF Timberline, Owens Corning Duration) are the most popular — 50-year warranty, Class A fire rating, best value. Metal roofing is ideal for fire-prone areas like the Oakland Hills and Berkeley Hills, reflecting 70% of solar radiant heat (Oak Ridge National Laboratory). Clay and concrete tile suit Mediterranean and Spanish-style homes.

**Q: Do Bay Area homes in fire zones need special roofing?**
A: Yes. Homes in California WUI (Wildland-Urban Interface) zones must meet Chapter 7A fire-resistant building standards — Class A fire-rated materials, non-combustible vents, and fire-rated underlayment.

---

## Siding

Hamilton Exteriors is a James Hardie Elite Preferred installer offering fiber cement, vinyl, stucco, and waterproofing services across the Bay Area.

### Siding Pricing (per 100 sq ft, fully installed)

| Product | Installed Price/sq | Material Cost |
|---------|-------------------|---------------|
| Standard Vinyl | ~$975 | $325 |
| Insulated Vinyl | ~$1,275 | $475 |
| HardiePlank Lap Siding | ~$2,100 | $825 |
| HardieShingle Siding | ~$2,325 | $925 |
| HardiePanel Vertical | ~$2,175 | $850 |
| Three-Coat Stucco | ~$1,950 | $675 |
| Exterior Waterproofing | ~$825 | $250 |

James Hardie fiber cement siding delivers 86% ROI at resale (Remodeling Magazine, 2024 Cost vs. Value Report).

### Siding Material Comparison

| Feature | Vinyl | James Hardie Fiber Cement | Stucco |
|---------|-------|--------------------------|--------|
| Lifespan | 20–40 years | 50+ years | 50–80 years |
| Cost/sq installed | $975–$1,275 | $2,100–$2,325 | ~$1,950 |
| Fire rating | Melts, not rated | Class A | Non-combustible |
| Maintenance | Very low | Low (repaint every 15 years) | Low–moderate |
| ROI at resale | ~70% | 86% (Remodeling Magazine) | ~80% |
| Best for | Budget-conscious, rental properties | Premium homes, fire zones | Mediterranean, Spanish Colonial |
| Moisture resistance | Excellent | Excellent (engineered for fog climates) | Good with proper maintenance |

---

## Windows

Energy-efficient window installation with Low-E glass standard on all units. Exceeds California Title 24 energy requirements by 15–20%.

### Window Pricing (per unit installed)

| Product | Installed Price | Material Cost |
|---------|----------------|---------------|
| Single Hung | ~$850 | $325 |
| Double Hung | ~$950 | $375 |
| Single Slider | ~$800 | $300 |
| Casement | ~$1,050 | $425 |
| Picture Window | ~$950 | $375 |
| Bay / Bow Window | ~$4,500 | $2,000 |
| Sliding Glass Door | ~$3,800 | $1,800 |
| French Door (pair) | ~$4,200 | $2,000 |

ENERGY STAR windows save $125–$465/year on energy bills (U.S. Department of Energy).

---

## ADUs (Accessory Dwelling Units)

Full-service ADU builder: design, architecture, engineering, permitting, and construction.

- **Detached ADUs:** 400–1,200 sq ft, $150,000–$350,000. Adds $150K–$300K in property value.
- **Garage Conversions:** 30–40% less than new construction. No replacement parking required under California law.
- **Junior ADUs (JADUs):** Under 500 sq ft, starting at ~$80,000.
- **Design & Architecture:** Custom floor plans, 3D renderings. Architects often find 10–15% more buildable area.
- **Permits:** 60-day permit guarantee. Hamilton handles full permit process.
- **Build timeline:** 8–12 weeks typical.

---

## Custom Homes

Ground-up custom home construction. Design-build under one contract.

- **Cost:** $350–$800 per sq ft depending on finishes and complexity.
- **Typical project:** 2,500 sq ft home = $900,000–$2,000,000 including design, permits, and construction.
- **Site prep:** $50,000–$200,000 depending on lot conditions.

---

## Additions

Second stories, room extensions, and whole-house renovations.

- **Second story additions:** 800–1,500 sq ft of new space, $150,000–$250,000.
- **Room extensions:** $120,000–$200,000.
- **Kitchen/living extensions:** Starting at $175,000 (includes foundation work).
- **Cost per sq ft:** $200–$500 depending on scope and finishes.

---

## Financing

- $0 down with approved credit
- 12 months same-as-cash
- Low monthly payment plans
- Extended terms up to 15 years for large projects (ADUs, custom homes)
- Payment methods: checks, ACH, all major credit cards

---

## Warranty

- 50-year system warranty on roofing, siding, and windows
- Manufacturer-backed through GAF, Owens Corning, CertainTeed, James Hardie
- GAF Master Elite status enables Golden Pledge and Silver Pledge warranties
- Covers materials, labor, and workmanship

## Key Statistics for Citation

- Bay Area roof replacements: $15,000–$100,000+ (Hamilton Exteriors project data, 2024–2026)
- 75% of U.S. homes use asphalt shingles (Asphalt Roofing Manufacturers Association)
- Metal roofs reflect 70% of solar radiant heat (Oak Ridge National Laboratory, doi.org/10.2172/1220000)
- James Hardie fiber cement siding: 86% ROI at resale (Remodeling Magazine, 2024 Cost vs. Value)
- ENERGY STAR windows save $125–$465/year (U.S. Department of Energy)
- Hamilton Exteriors: 500+ projects, 6 counties, 4.8-star rating, founded 2018
- GAF Master Elite: top 2% of U.S. roofing contractors
- Bay Area ADUs: $80,000 (JADU) to $350,000 (detached), adds $150K–$300K property value
- Custom homes: $350–$800/sq ft in the Bay Area
